info.title: Market Frontend Integration Contract
info.description: Machine-readable contract for all current API endpoints intended for frontend integrations and Codex agents.

get.summary: Render the built-in HTML request sample page.

200.description: Render the built-in HTML request sample page.
Return the health probe payload.

get.summary: Return the current auth session state.

200.description: Return the current auth session state.

get.summary: Return the effective subscription access for the authenticated user.

200.description: Return the effective subscription access for the authenticated user.

post.summary: Send a login OTP to the provided email address using Resend.

post.summary: Verify an email OTP and create or link a session-backed account.

Return the grouped symbol catalog.
Search symbols by query text.

200.description: Run a manual signal scan across specific or default symbols.

Return latest cached analysis summaries.

201.description: Run a backtest across one or more symbols.
